sourceNote: TCGplayer Authentication Center study, read directly from the primary article (Peter Day, updated 2025-02-27): more than 8,000 Paradox Rift booster packs opened, per-tier rates with 95% confidence intervals — Double Rare 15.57% ±0.76, Ultra Rare 6.64% ±0.53, Illustration Rare 7.70% ±0.56, Special Illustration Rare 2.11% ±0.30, Hyper Rare 1.22% ±0.23. Paradox Rift is where TPCi tightened the top end: SIR and HR odds dropped to roughly two-thirds of the earlier Scarlet & Violet sets (Obsidian Flames' 3.13%/1.92% became 2.11%/1.22%), while Double Rare rose to keep the overall better-than-Rare rate near 30%. No ACE SPEC tier — that rarity did not return until Temporal Forces (sv5).
